0.content:
# 📊 [CLIENT_NAME] [LOCATION] — C-Suite Business Dashboard

**Application:** [APP_NAME] (`APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) | **Data Sources:** RUM Sessions, BizEvents (ISO Hotel Bookings), Core Web Vitals

---

### 🏥 Business Health Summary

The four KPI tiles below provide **at-a-glance operational health**. Thresholds are colour-coded: 🟢 Green = Healthy | 🟡 Yellow = Attention | 🔴 Red = Action Required

| Indicator | Measures | 🟢 Healthy | 🟡 Attention | 🔴 Action |
|-----------|----------|------------|-------------|----------|
| **Total Sessions** | Website traffic volume | ≥ 200K | ≥ 100K | < 100K |
| **Error Rate** | % sessions with errors | < 40% | < 60% | ≥ 60% |
| **Checkout → Booking** | ISO checkout conversion | ≥ 60% | ≥ 30% | < 30% |
| **Bookings P95 Load** | 95th pctl page load time | < 5,000 ms | < 10,000 ms | ≥ 10,000 ms |

> **Revenue Scope:** ISO Hotel Bookings only. Ticket sales ([TICKET_PROVIDER]) require GTM tag deployment — see Section 1 enhancement notes.

1.title: Total Sessions
1.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter frontend.name == "[APP_NAME]"
| summarize sessions = count()

2.title: Session Error Rate
2.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter frontend.name == "[APP_NAME]"
| summarize total = count(), with_errors = countIf(error.count > 0)
| fieldsAdd error_pct = 100.0 * toDouble(with_errors) / toDouble(total)

3.title: Checkout → Booking Conversion
3.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| fieldsKeep dt.rum.session.id
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| summarize total_checkouts = count(), completed = countIf(isNotNull(completion.completed))
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate = 100.0 * toDouble(completed) / toDouble(total_checkouts)

4.title: Bookings Page P95 Load
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/"
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000

5.query: data record(a="💰 Section 1 — Real-Time Revenue & Sales Overview")

6.title: Completed Revenue
6.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num)

7.title: Completed Bookings
7.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| fieldsKeep dt.rum.session.id
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize completions = count()

8.title: Average Booking Value
8.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize aov = avg(total_num)

9.title: Lost Revenue (Abandoned)
9.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| summarize checkout_revenue = sum(total_num), completed_revenue = sumIf(total_num, isNotNull(completion.completed))
| fieldsAdd lost_revenue = checkout_revenue - completed_revenue

10.title: Revenue & Bookings Over Time
10.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| makeTimeseries revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count()

11.title: Revenue by Package Type
11.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count(), by: {summary.packageType}
| sort revenue desc

12.content:
## 📈 Enhancing Revenue & Sales Visibility

**Currently Available:** ✅ ISO Hotel booking revenue ✅ Average order value ✅ Completed booking counts ✅ Lost revenue from abandoned checkouts

**Data Gaps & Recommended Enhancements:**

| Gap | How to Fix | Business Value |
|-----|-----------|----------------|
| **No ticket sales revenue** | Deploy [TICKET_PROVIDER] checkout BizEvent GTM tag (designed & ready: `example/[ticket_provider]_gtm_tracking_tag.html`) | Track ticket sales alongside hotel revenue for **total revenue picture** |
| **No web vs mobile vs partner channel split** | Implement UTM parameter passthrough from marketing campaigns into booking URLs | Attribute revenue to **Paid Search, Organic, Email, Direct, Affiliate** |
| **No confirmed payment gateway data** | Integrate payment gateway success/failure events via Dynatrace BizEvents API ingest | Distinguish **checkout intent from actual confirmed revenue** |
| **Weekly / monthly trending** | Already supported — change the dashboard **time picker** to 30d for monthly, 24h for daily | Instant trend visibility by adjusting timeframe |

> **🚀 Quick Win:** The [TICKET_PROVIDER] ticket checkout tag has been designed and is ready for GTM deployment. Once published, ticket revenue data will flow automatically and can be added to this dashboard.

13.query: data record(a="🔄 Section 2 — Conversion Funnel Performance")

14.title: 🏠 Homepage Sessions
14.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your-location/"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

15.title: 📅 Bookings SPA Sessions
15.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

16.title: 🛒 Checkout Sessions
16.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| summarize checkouts = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

17.title: ✅ Confirmed Bookings
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| summarize confirmations = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

18.title: Checkout → Confirmation Rate
18.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| fieldsKeep dt.rum.session.id
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| summarize total_checkouts = count(), completed = countIf(isNotNull(completion.completed))
| fieldsAdd conversion = 100.0 * toDouble(completed) / toDouble(total_checkouts), dropoff = 100.0 * toDouble(total_checkouts - completed) / toDouble(total_checkouts)

19.title: Completed vs Abandoned Checkouts Over Time
19.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| fieldsAdd status = if(isNotNull(completion.completed), "Completed", else: "Abandoned")
| makeTimeseries completed = countIf(status == "Completed"), abandoned = countIf(status == "Abandoned")

20.content:
## 🔄 Enhancing Conversion Funnel Visibility

**Currently Available:** ✅ Page-level funnel (Homepage → Bookings SPA → Checkout → Confirmation) ✅ Checkout-to-completion conversion rate ✅ Completed vs abandoned split over time

**Data Gaps & Recommended Enhancements:**

| Gap | How to Fix | Business Value |
|-----|-----------|----------------|
| **No step-level drop-off within booking SPA** | Deploy BizEvents at each wizard step (Hotels → Rooms → Extras → Checkout) via GTM or inline JS | Identify **exactly where users abandon** within the 4-step booking wizard |
| **No basket add/remove events** | Instrument add-to-cart and remove-from-cart actions as BizEvents | Measure **basket engagement** and identify friction points |
| **No ticket funnel tracking** | Deploy [TICKET_PROVIDER] ticket BizEvent tag (ready: `example/[ticket_provider]_gtm_tracking_tag.html`) | Track the complete **ticket purchase funnel** alongside hotel bookings |
| **No mobile vs desktop conversion comparison** | Add `device.type` split to funnel queries (data is already available on sessions) | Compare **platform-specific conversion rates** to prioritise mobile/desktop fixes |
| **No payment failure tracking** | Capture payment attempt + payment failure events from the checkout form | Quantify **payment-stage abandonment** vs voluntary abandonment |

> **💡 Tip:** The funnel currently shows page-level drops. The ISO booking SPA runs within a single URL (`/your/bookings/`), so individual wizard steps (Select Hotel → Select Room → Add Extras → Checkout) are invisible without step-level BizEvents.

21.query: data record(a="📢 Section 3 — Channel & Campaign Effectiveness")

22.title: Sessions by Device Type
22.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter frontend.name == "[APP_NAME]"
| summarize sessions = count(), by: {device.type}
| sort sessions desc

23.title: Revenue by Device Type
23.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count(), by: {device.type}
| sort revenue desc

24.title: Bookings by Country
24.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count(), by: {geo.country.name}
| sort revenue desc
| limit 10

25.content:
## 📢 Enhancing Channel & Campaign Visibility

**Currently Available:** ✅ Device type split (mobile / desktop / tablet) ✅ Geographic source of bookings ✅ Sales channel code from booking URL

**Data Gaps & Recommended Enhancements:**

| Gap | How to Fix | Business Value |
|-----|-----------|----------------|
| **No marketing source attribution** | Implement consistent **UTM parameter tagging** (`utmSource`, `utmMedium`, `utmCampaign`) on all marketing URLs — ISO BizEvent schema already captures these fields | Attribute revenue to **Paid Search, Organic, Email, Direct, Social, Affiliate** channels |
| **No ROAS (Return on Ad Spend)** | Integrate marketing platform spend data (Google Ads, Meta, etc.) via **Dynatrace BizEvents API** as daily cost events | Calculate **cost per acquisition** and **return on ad spend** per campaign |
| **No referrer / landing page tracking** | Capture `document.referrer` and landing page URL as RUM session properties | Identify **top-performing landing pages** and **organic vs paid traffic mix** |
| **No email/affiliate channel tracking** | Ensure all email and affiliate links include UTM parameters | Measure **email campaign ROI** and **affiliate partner performance** |

> **💡 The Foundation Exists:** The ISO BizEvent schema already includes `url.utmSource`, `url.utmMedium`, and `url.utmCampaign` fields. Once marketing teams consistently tag campaign URLs with UTM parameters, channel attribution data will flow automatically into this dashboard without any Dynatrace configuration changes.

26.query: data record(a="⚡ Section 4 — Digital Experience Impact on Sales")

27.title: Bookings Page 1P Errors
27.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/"
| filter url.provider == "first_party"
| summarize errors = count(), sessions_affected = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

28.title: Sessions with Errors %
28.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter frontend.name == "[APP_NAME]"
| summarize total = count(), with_errors = countIf(error.count > 0)
| fieldsAdd error_session_pct = 100.0 * toDouble(with_errors) / toDouble(total)

29.title: Site-Wide P75 LCP
29.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize p75_lcp_ms = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000

30.title: First-Party Errors Over Time
30.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter url.provider == "first_party"
| makeTimeseries first_party_errors = count()

31.title: Core Web Vitals by Page (Top 10)
31.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize
    Samples = count(),
    P75_LCP_ms = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    P75_INP_ms = percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    P75_CLS = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75),
    P75_TTFB_ms = percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000,
    by: {view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 30
| sort P75_LCP_ms desc
| limit 10

32.content:
## ⚡ Enhancing Digital Experience Impact Visibility

**Currently Available:** ✅ Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS, TTFB) per page ✅ First-party error counts and trends ✅ Bookings page load time (P95) ✅ Session error rates ✅ Lost revenue from abandoned checkouts

**Data Gaps & Recommended Enhancements:**

| Gap | How to Fix | Business Value |
|-----|-----------|----------------|
| **No backend APM correlation** | Deploy Dynatrace **OneAgent** on the ISO booking engine servers (`vacations.example.com`) | Correlate **server-side latency** (API 500s, slow queries) with revenue impact |
| **No synthetic monitoring** | Create **Dynatrace Synthetic Browser Monitors** for the booking flow (homepage → hotel select → checkout → payment) | Detect **outages in real-time** before users are impacted |
| **No performance ↔ conversion correlation** | Build SLOs on checkout latency + error rate, then correlate SLO violations with conversion dips | Quantify **'every 1s of latency = X% conversion drop'** |
| **No payment gateway uptime** | Instrument payment provider health checks as synthetic monitors or BizEvents | Track **payment gateway availability** and failure rates |
| **No estimated revenue lost to slowness** | Correlate performance percentile buckets with conversion rates per session | Calculate **'sessions > 5s load had Y% lower conversion = $Z lost'** |

> **💡 Key Insight:** The bookings page currently shows ~5,400 first-party errors/day affecting ~1,500 sessions. Top errors include booking API 500s (hotel/list, verifyAnnualPassAccess) and a missing image (loader.svg). Fixing these could directly improve conversion.

33.query: data record(a="👥 Section 5 — Customer & Booking Insights")

34.title: Booking Volume Over Time
34.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| makeTimeseries bookings = count()

35.title: Revenue by Room Type
35.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count(), by: {summary.roomType}
| sort revenue desc

36.title: Top Add-On Services Included
36.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| filter isNotNull(summary.services) and summary.services != ""
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| expand service = splitString(summary.services, ", ")
| summarize count = count(), by: {service}
| sort count desc

37.title: Revenue by Sales Channel
37.query:
fetch bizevents, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter event.type == "com.example.checkout.summary"
| sort timestamp desc
| dedup dt.rum.session.id
| fieldsAdd total_num = toDouble(replaceString(replaceString(summary.total, "$", ""), ",", ""))
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
    | filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX"
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
    | filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
    | summarize completed = count(), by: {dt.rum.session.id}
  ], sourceField:dt.rum.session.id, lookupField:dt.rum.session.id, prefix:"completion."
| filter isNotNull(completion.completed)
| summarize revenue = sum(total_num), bookings = count(), avg_order = avg(total_num), by: {url.salesChannelCode}
| sort revenue desc

38.content:
## 👥 Enhancing Customer & Booking Insights

**Currently Available:** ✅ Booking volume trends ✅ Revenue by room type (themed rooms) ✅ Included services / add-ons per booking ✅ Revenue by sales channel code ✅ Geographic source of bookings

**Data Gaps & Recommended Enhancements:**

| Gap | How to Fix | Business Value |
|-----|-----------|----------------|
| **No ticket type breakdown** | Deploy [TICKET_PROVIDER] ticket BizEvent tag — captures ticket type (1-Day, 2-Day, FastTrack, premium add-ons) | Understand **ticket product mix** and **premium upsell rates** |
| **No occupancy / guest mix analysis** | Parse the `url.occupancy` JSON from BizEvents in DQL (`parse(url.occupancy, "JSON")`) | Analyse **room occupancy patterns** (adults vs children, room count) for demand planning |
| **No peak booking time analysis** | Already available — add hourly breakdown tile using `formatTimestamp(timestamp, "HH")` | Identify **peak booking hours** for staffing and server capacity planning |
| **No travel date / demand forecasting** | Parse `url.start` and `url.end` fields from BizEvents to extract **travel dates** (vs booking dates) | Build **forward-looking demand calendars** showing peak stay periods |
| **No repeat customer identification** | Implement `dtrum.identifyUser(email)` on logged-in users or post-booking confirmation | Analyse **repeat vs new customer mix** and **loyalty booking patterns** |
| **No stay duration analysis** | Calculate `dateDiff(toTimestamp(url.end), toTimestamp(url.start))` in DQL | Understand **1-night vs 2-night vs 3-night stay preferences** |

> **💡 Rich Data Potential:** The ISO Checkout BizEvent already captures extensive booking data (package type, room type, services, dates, occupancy, prices). Many of these enhancements only require DQL parsing of existing fields — no new instrumentation needed.
